TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspacePrimariesCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies color primaries using ITU-T H.273 Coding-independent Code Point (CICP) values.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` identifies a set of color primaries as specified by ITU-T H.273 (Coding-independent Code Points). Pass a value from this enumeration to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp*> along with a transfer function to create an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace> that describes an HDR or standard-dynamic-range color space defined by a standards body.
This enumeration is a value type and does not require disposal.
## Examples
```csharp // Create a Rec. 2020 / PQ color space for HDR content var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp GenericFilm = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Generic film color primaries (ITU-T H.273 value 8).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp ItuTH273Value22 = int32(22)

Docs.summary: Color primaries corresponding to ITU-T H.273 value 22 (EBU Tech 3213-E).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec2020 = int32(9)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 (Rec. 2020) color primaries, used for ultra-high-definition video (ITU-T H.273 value 9).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G (PAL/SECAM) color primaries (ITU-T H.273 value 5).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M (NTSC) color primaries (ITU-T H.273 value 4).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 (Rec. 601) color primaries for standard-definition video (ITU-T H.273 value 6).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 (Rec. 709) color primaries for high-definition video and sRGB (ITU-T H.273 value 1).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteEg4321 = int32(12)

Docs.summary: SMPTE EG 432-1 (P3-D65) color primaries used for Digital Cinema (ITU-T H.273 value 12).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteRp4312 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: SMPTE RP 431-2 (DCI-P3) color primaries used for Digital Cinema (ITU-T H.273 value 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 color primaries for early HDTV production (ITU-T H.273 value 7).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(10)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 (XYZ) color primaries used for Digital Cinema distribution (ITU-T H.273 value 10).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: Unknown or unspecified color primaries (ITU-T H.273 value 0).
